channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: US sanctions the founder of Georgia's ruling political party
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration has imposed sanctions on the founder of Georgia’s ruling political party, which has steered the country away from a pro-Western stance and towards Russia, U.S. officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baja to lease warehouse space to house deported migrants
item.description: He also stated the warehouse location will have easier access from the ports of entry where migrants might be deported instead of having to bus them to several areas in the city.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, Fox 5

item.title: Former FBI and CIA chief urges senators to sink Patel, Gabbard
item.description: William H. Webster, former FBI and CIA director, wrote a letter to U.S. senators urging them to reject President-elect Trump's choice of Kash Patel and Tulsi Gabbard to lead the FBI and national intelligence, respectively.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Most Americans blame insurance profits and denials alongside the killer in UHC CEO death, poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Most Americans believe health insurance profits and coverage denials share responsibility for the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO — although not as much as the person who pulled the trigger, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: LINLEY SANDERS, TOM MURPHY and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump 'border czar' says he will override sanctuary city roadblocks
item.description: "Sanctuary jurisdictions aren't going to stop what we're going to do," Tom Homan said in a NewsNation interview.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Vivian Moreno launches bid for Vargas' seat on Board of Supervisors
item.description: Days after San Diego County Board of Supervisors Chair Nora Vargas' surprise decision to leave her post at the end of her current term, the field for a potential special election to fill her seat has started to take shape.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Bald eagle finally becomes official US bird
item.description: The eagle had long been associated with the U.S., but it only just officially became the national bird.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Americans are exhausted by political news. TV ratings and a new AP-NORC poll show they're tuning out
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As a Democrat who immersed himself in political news during the presidential campaign, Ziad Aunallah has much in common with many Americans since the election. He's tuned out. “People are mentally exhausted,” said Aunallah, 45, of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The bald eagle is officially America’s national bird, thanks to a Minnesotan
item.description: After learning the U.S. doesn’t officially recognize the bald eagle as its national bird, a Minnesota man swooped in and wrote a bill for Congress. This week, Biden signed it into law.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Trump tells 37 people with sentences commuted by Biden to 'go to hell' in lengthy Christmas post
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday used a lengthy Christmas Day social media post to tell the 37 people who had their death sentences commuted by President Biden to "go to hell.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden to leave White House with little fanfare
item.description: Editor's note: President Biden commuted the sentences of 37 people on federal death row to life in prison. President Biden is readying to leave the White House with little fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump faces roadblocks to ambitious border crackdown
item.description: President-elect Trump has made ambitious promises on the border and immigration, including the biggest deportation operation ever seen. But much like in Trump’s first term in office, his immigration agenda faces significant roadblocks.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden gives life in prison to 37 of 40 federal death row inmates
item.description: The move spares the lives of people convicted in killings, including the slayings of police and military officers, people on federal land and those involved in deadly bank robberies or drug deals, as well as the killings of guards or prisoners in federal facilities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gaetz sues Ethics Committee in last-minute bid to block release of report
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) filed a lawsuit Monday against the House Ethics Committee in a last-minute attempt to block the panel from releasing its report on him.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Trump threatens to try to take back the Panama Canal
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Donald Trump suggested Sunday that his new administration could try to regain control of the Panama Canal that the United States “foolishly” ceded to its Central American ally, contending that shippers are charged “ridiculous” fees to pass through the vital transportation channel link
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: As Texas Chief Justice Nathan Hecht prepares to retire, he reflects on the Supreme Court he helped change
item.description: Over 35 years, Hecht modernized the court, increased access to justice for the poor and saw his conservative views come to dominate the bench.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Eleanor Klibanoff, KPRC 2

item.title: Twenty years after first proposed, NewRange still vying to build Minnesota’s first copper mine
item.description: Nearly 20 years after it was first proposed to state and federal regulators, the project formerly known as PolyMet Mining — now NewRange Copper Nickel — soldiers on, despite environmental groups’ contention that the project in its current form is dead.
item.dc:creator: Dan Kraker, MPR News

item.title: Biden commutes sentences of 37 death row inmates to life without parole
item.description: "In good conscience, I cannot stand back and let a new administration resume executions that I halted," Biden said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: Biden commutes sentences of 37 federal death row prisoners
item.description: Opponents of the death penalty had urged President Joe Biden to take this step, given the number of executions that took place during President-elect Donald Trump's first term.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram, MPR News

item.title: Broken tie in Minnesota House would give GOP muscle at start of 2025 session
item.description: Even with a slight majority, Republicans could flex newfound power at the start of the legislative session if DFL lawmaker’s disqualification stands.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump pushes back on 'President Musk' claims
item.description: “No, he’s not gonna be president, that I can tell you,” Trump said. “And I’m safe, you know why? He can’t be, he wasn’t born in this country.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Trump suggests Panama Canal be returned to US control
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday again took on the matter of the Panama Canal, suggesting to a conference of his supporters that it be returned to U.S. control in a remarkable suggestion to push a sovereign country to cede territory.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Flood gates are dropped from a plan to protect the Jersey Shore’s back bays from catastrophic storms
item.description: Huge gates at the mouths of three inlets and barriers across bays are no longer part of a plan to protect New Jersey’s back bays from the type of catastrophic flooding they endured during Superstorm Sandy.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez faces uncertain political future
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) is facing an uncertain future after a pivotal setback this week, when she lost her race to lead Democrats on the House Oversight and Accountability Committee. The 74-year-old Rep. Gerry Connolly’s (D-Va.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Here are the 34 Republicans that voted against the funding bill to avoid shutdown
item.description: More than 30 House Republicans voted against the government funding bill to avert a shutdown on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: What is next for Florida's insurance market as CFO Patronis steps down
item.description: He is the state's top insurance official, but Florida's Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis is stepping down in a few months to run for Congress. Governor Ron DeSantis will appoint a temporary replacement to the CFO position, as Florida residents continue to face a fragile insurance market.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC
